[[File:Saleucami_cloning_complex.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] is prepared to destroy the Cloning Complex.]]

The '''Saleucami Cloning Complex''' was an installation, overseen by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]], built in the [[Magma Caverns]] of [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]]. There, the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] created an [[Morgukai Shadow Army|army]] of [[Morgukai]] [[Cloning/Legends|clones]].

[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] damaged part of the installations during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The rest was destroyed when the magma devastated the area due to a volcanic eruption.
